title: Learn AWS IAM in less than 10 minutes
summary: Educational video tutorial from AWS Developers explaining AWS Identity and Access Management (IAM) fundamentals in under 10 minutes. Covers the core concepts of users, roles, and policies, introduces the principle of least privilege, and demonstrates IAM Access Analyzer for permission verification.
